name: Harpoon
description: A perfect solution for the flight of foes.

abilities.name: Draw Forth
abilities.description: Launches a harpoon that latches onto the target, pulling the caster and the target towards each other, meeting in the middle. Targeting a tree always pulls you all the way to the tree. Has a maximum pull distance. Cooldown: 19. Mana Cost: 50. Cast Range: 700. Min Pull Distance: 100. Max Pull Distance: 1000. Pull Duration: 0.3. When the caster is ranged, pulls the target and the caster for a percentage of the distance instead, but still respecting the max pull distance.

abilities.name: Echo Strike
abilities.description: The next attack grants the wielder a buff that greatly increases attack speed for one attack. Cooldown: 5. Attack Speed Bonus: 490. Number of Attacks: 1. Move Speed Slow: 100%. Duration: 1. The triggering attack also briefly slows the enemy's movement speed. The second attack does not slow.
